GDPR.implementation: We restrict document storage and metadata processing only to values relevant to mathematical extraction.

GDPR.requirement: Right to Erasure (Right to be Forgotten)
GDPR.implementation: DELETE /api/v1/documents/{id} endpoint fully deletes all physical files, database rows, vector indices, and graph nodes associated with the document.
Export Engine supports downloading structured Universal Export Objects (UEO) in standard formats (JSON, YAML, Markdown).

SOC_2.implementation: Authentication via HS256 JWT signatures. Authorization verified using RBAC and ABAC access policies on every API endpoint.
All connections enforce TLS 1.3. Databases and vector storages use AES-256-GCM symmetric block encryption for volumes.
Audit logging middleware logs all API requests with user ID, request ID, status, and IP mapping.

ISO_27001.implementation: Strict privilege separation. Users are restricted to their logical namespaces and documents.
No custom cryptography. Uses python-cryptography library implementing FIPS-approved algorithms.
Static and dynamic analysis run in CI/CD pipeline. Pinned dependencies scanned for CVEs daily.
